name: redwood
description: Mateu renderer built as an Oracle OJET-native island: the authentic Redwood shell (Oracle's oj-web-applayout CSS from the CDN) + real oj-c/oj-sp/oj-dynamic content components, driven by the ported pure-TS MateuViewController over the shared Mateu sync wire protocol. Rebuilt from scratch against real Visual Builder code.

scripts.copy: tsc && vite build && mv dist/index.html dist/_index.html && cp -rf dist/* ../../../../../backend/shared/frontend/redwood-lit/src/main/resources/META-INF/resources && cp -rf dist/* ../../../../../backend/shared/frontend/redwood-lit/src/main/resources/static
